title: Notification No.93/2016-Cus(NT), dated 1.7.2016
text: Page 1 of 2 [To Be Published In The Gazette Of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 93/2016-Customs(N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 1st July, 2016 S.O. (E). - In exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962) and in supersession of order as stated in column (5) of the Table below, the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints officer mentioned in column (6) to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise powers and discharge duties conferred or imposed on officer mentioned in column (4) of the Table in respect of noticees mentioned in column (2) of the Table for purpose of adjudication of show cause notices mentioned column (3) of the Table, namely:- Table Sl. No Name of Noticee (M/s.) Show Cause Notice No. and date Name of Adjudicating Authority Order No. and date Common Adjudicating Authority Appointed (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) 1 The Park (SAP) DRI F.
